title: Magmatic Exile
description:
Banish that pesky glowfluid from the realms deep below!

Fixes below -54 Lava generation.
body:
# This attempts to fix MC-237017, a bug that fills all caves below -54 with lava.
## With this mod, the lava level is tied to the bedrock level instead of being hardcoded, making it possible to generate caves hundreds of blocks deep.

### Serverside only.
---
>**NORMAL VERSION:**
>
>This has no real use if you don't use a datapack or other means of deepening your world below -64!
---
>**PLUS VERSION:** ~~work in progress~~
>
>Includes a datapack to expand your world from 640 to -512 making it effectively 1152 blocks tall.   
>It also includes rudimentary support for ores *W.I.P.!* but some things might still be out of place.
>
>DISCLAIMER: Your computer will die!
---
>**ADDONS / SUPPORT**
>
>Most mods should work well and expand into the deeper world, some may only generate in the normal range tho.
>
>I suggest checking out [Volcanic Caverns by F1ashFyre](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/volcanic-caverns) as it goes really well together because the caverns will only generate at the low end of the world.
>
>[Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) Stuff also seems to generate fine in the deep parts of the world.


>*Direct mod support for many mods structures & ores will be added eventually and listed here.* *If your mods generation scales dynamically and works with this, be sure to contact me through github so i can add it here!*
---
***This is a direct forge port of:***
*https://github.com/Andrew6rant/MC-237017-Fix*

***Ore distribution taken and modified from:***
*https://modrinth.com/datapack/larger-ore-veins-deluxe/versions*
